## Functions

<table><thead><tr><th>

Function


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[enableHydration(options)](../fast-element.enablehydration/)


</td><td>

Enables hydration support for prerendered FAST elements.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[hydrationDebugger()](../fast-element.hydrationdebugger/)


</td><td>

Returns a [HydrationDebugger](../fast-element.hydrationdebugger/) that, when supplied to `enableHydration({ debugger })`<!-- -->, installs the rich hydration mismatch formatter: a single-line "Expected … / Received …" message plus an HTML snippet of the SSR DOM and structured `expected`<!-- -->/`received` fields on the thrown error (both `HydrationBindingError` and `HydrationTargetElementError`<!-- -->).

Without the debugger, hydration errors emit only a minimal one-line message pointing at this function — keeping the runtime hydration cost small for production bundles that do not need rich diagnostics.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[isHydratable(view)](../fast-element.ishydratable/)


</td><td>

**_(BETA)_** Tests if a template or ViewController is hydratable.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[isHydratable(template)](../fast-element.ishydratable_1/)


</td><td>

**_(BETA)_**


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[isHydratable(template)](../fast-element.ishydratable_2/)


</td><td>

**_(BETA)_**


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[isHydratable(template)](../fast-element.ishydratable_3/)


</td><td>

**_(BETA)_**


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

Interface


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[CaptureType](../fast-element.capturetype/)


</td><td>

A marker interface used to capture types when interpolating Directive helpers into templates.

<tr><td>

[ContentTemplate](../fast-element.contenttemplate/)


</td><td>

A simple template that can create ContentView instances.

<tr><td>

[ContentView](../fast-element.contentview/)


</td><td>

A simple View that can be interpolated into HTML content.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[Disposable\_2](../fast-element.disposable_2/)


</td><td>

Provides a mechanism for releasing resources.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[DOMPolicy](../fast-element.dompolicy/)


</td><td>

A policy that controls whether values can be written to DOM sinks.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ElementView](../fast-element.elementview/)


</td><td>

A View representing DOM nodes specifically for rendering the view of a custom element.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ElementViewTemplate](../fast-element.elementviewtemplate/)


</td><td>

A template capable of creating views specifically for rendering custom elements.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ExecutionContext](../fast-element.executioncontext/)


</td><td>

Provides additional contextual information available to behaviors and expressions.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ExpressionController](../fast-element.expressioncontroller/)


</td><td>

Controls the lifecycle of an expression and provides relevant context.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[HydratableContentTemplate](../fast-element.hydratablecontenttemplate/)


</td><td>

**_(BETA)_** A template capable of hydrating content from existing DOM nodes.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[HydratableElementViewTemplate](../fast-element.hydratableelementviewtemplate/)


</td><td>

**_(BETA)_** A template capable of hydrating an element view from existing DOM nodes.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[HydratableSyntheticViewTemplate](../fast-element.hydratablesyntheticviewtemplate/)


</td><td>

**_(BETA)_** A template capable of hydrating a synthetic view from existing DOM nodes.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[HydratableView](../fast-element.hydratableview/)


</td><td>



</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[HydrationDebugger](../fast-element.hydrationdebugger/)


</td><td>

Opt-in hydration debugger configuration. Pass to `enableHydration` to install the rich "Expected / Received" hydration mismatch formatter:

```ts
import { enableHydration, hydrationDebugger } from "@microsoft/fast-element/hydration.js";

enableHydration({ debugger: hydrationDebugger() });
```


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[HydrationDiagnostic](../fast-element.hydrationdiagnostic/)


</td><td>

Pluggable formatter for hydration mismatch errors. The default implementation is a minimal one-line message; install [hydrationDebugger()](../fast-element.hydrationdebugger/) to swap in the rich "Expected … / Received …" formatter with an HTML snippet of the SSR DOM.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[HydrationDiagnosticResult](../fast-element.hydrationdiagnosticresult/)


</td><td>

Result of a hydration-mismatch diagnostic format call.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[HydrationMismatchActual](../fast-element.hydrationmismatchactual/)


</td><td>

Structured description of the DOM hydration actually encountered at the mismatch point.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[HydrationMismatchExpectation](../fast-element.hydrationmismatchexpectation/)


</td><td>

Structured description of the binding hydration was expecting to apply when a mismatch is detected.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[HydrationOptions](../fast-element.hydrationoptions/)


</td><td>

Options for configuring hydration behavior.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[SyntheticView](../fast-element.syntheticview/)


</td><td>

A view representing a range of DOM nodes which can be added/removed ad hoc.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[SyntheticViewTemplate](../fast-element.syntheticviewtemplate/)


</td><td>

A template capable of rendering views not specifically connected to custom elements.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[View](../fast-element.view/)


</td><td>

Represents a collection of DOM nodes which can be bound to a data source.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ViewBehavior](../fast-element.viewbehavior/)


</td><td>

Represents an object that can contribute behavior to a view.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ViewBehaviorBoundaries](../fast-element.viewbehaviorboundaries/)


</td><td>

Stores relationships between a [ViewBehaviorFactory](../fast-element.viewbehaviorfactory/) and the [ViewBoundaries](../fast-element.viewboundaries/) the factory created.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ViewBehaviorFactory](../fast-element.viewbehaviorfactory/)


</td><td>

A factory that can create a [ViewBehavior](../fast-element.viewbehavior/) associated with a particular location within a DOM fragment.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ViewBoundaries](../fast-element.viewboundaries/)


</td><td>

Represents the DOM boundaries controlled by a view


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ViewController](../fast-element.viewcontroller/)


</td><td>

Controls the lifecycle of a view and provides relevant context.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ViewNodes](../fast-element.viewnodes/)


</td><td>



</td></tr>

Describes how the source's lifetime relates to its controller's lifetime.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[StopHydration](../fast-element.stophydration/)


</td><td>

Describes when FAST should stop hydrating newly connected prerendered elements.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[whenHydrated](../fast-element.whenhydrated/)


</td><td>

Resolves when the active hydration batch completes.


</td></tr>
